description_long: This is an elderly man with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He has short, white hair and a white beard, with visible facial wrinkles that suggest advanced age. He is dressed in a green, full-body suit with a white vertical stripe running down the front and a dark belt-like band around the waist. The suit appears to be a single piece, fitting closely to the body, and he wears dark shoes. His posture is straight, and there are no visible walking aids or accessories. The overall appearance is that of an older individual, possibly a resident or passerby in an urban environment.
description: An elderly man with white hair and beard, wearing a green full-body suit with a white front stripe and dark shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elderly man’s face, white beard, and the white vertical stripe on his green suit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of his face, the fit of the suit, and the absence of walking aids.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of his head, the green suit with a dark belt, and the back of his shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, suit fit, and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_style: A fitted, green full-body suit with a white vertical front stripe and a dark belt-like band, paired with dark shoes; no visible accessories.
attribute_facial_features: white beard, visible wrinkles, no glasses, neutral expression
